{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iceflower
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Iceflower]] is represented by the [[Utarian Collective]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
